channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Deion Sanders' contract at Colorado extended through the 2029 season
item.description: Colorado coach Deion Sanders has received a contract extension through the 2029 season after turning around a downtrodden program in just two seasons.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Memphis Grizzlies fire Taylor Jenkins, franchise's winningest coach
item.description: The Memphis Grizzlies fired Taylor Jenkins, their winningest coach, on Friday with the team struggling down the stretch and at risk of losing home-court advantage for the postseason. Still sitting at No.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Why the most popular accessory at SF’s Sweet 16 was being given out for free
item.description: One man's dream, a car accident and licensing troubles led to David Sierra, the creator of "Chomp Gloves," sparking joy in many fans outside the NCAA regional semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: Spanish court overturns soccer player Dani Alves' rape conviction on appeal
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Brazilian soccer player Dani Alves won his appeal against a sexual assault conviction as a Spanish court overturned the ruling Friday in a case that lasted more than three years and saw the former Barcelona defender spend 14 months in jail.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Gronk-a-Mania set to run wild over WrestleMania weekend
item.description: Rob Gronkowski grew up emulating his sports heroes in school, never shy about unleashing a Stone Cold Stunner or dropping a People’s Elbow on his roughhousing friends.
item.dc:creator: Dan Gelston, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: March Maddening? Timing of transfer portal opening can be tough on coaches still in the tourney
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Coaches still playing in the NCAA Tournament are having to split their time between preparing their teams for the Sweet 16 and talking to potential transfers who have entered the portal. Such is life in college basketball.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: AP mock NFL draft 2.0: Titans take Cam Ward first and Giants take Shedeur Sanders at No. 3
item.description: Cam Ward believes he solidified his shot to become the No. 1 pick in the NFL draft. The Tennessee Titans have the first crack to make the Heisman Trophy finalist from Miami their franchise quarterback.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: JuJu Watkins’ season-ending knee injury leaves a ‘big void’ in women’s NCAA Tournament
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Dawn Staley sent JuJu Watkins a text as soon as she saw the star Southern California sophomore suffer a season-ending knee injury on Monday night. It was “really tough” to see Watkins in pain, the South Carolina women's basketball coach said.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Giddey's halfcourt shot gives Bulls a buzzer-beating win, a night after the Lakers had their own
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Josh Giddey could feel it as soon as the ball left his fingertips. In a flash, teammates were mobbing him.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New San Diego Padres mural in North Park nears completion
item.description: A new San Diego Padres-themed mural in North Park replacing a previous work of public art that had been defaced earlier this year by fans of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers is nearing completion, just in time for opening weekend.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Cowboys star CeeDee Lamb's signature 'nose wipe' celebration no longer permitted, NFL says
item.description: The "nose wipe" celebration during games will be considered a violation of the NFL's unsportsmanlike conduct guidelines. The gesture is something CeeDee Lamb has commonly used.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: MTS boosts Trolley service for Padres Opening Weekend
item.description: The Friar Faithful will be taking over downtown San Diego on Thursday and into the weekend as the Padres take on the Atlanta Braves, marking the first home games of the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ed Lenderman, Fox 5

item.title: Georgia receiver Nitro Tuggle reached speeds of over 100 mph before reckless driving arrest: report
item.description: The latest Georgia football player to be arrested on driving-related crimes was said to be traveling speeds of over 100 mph before his arrest, according to a report.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Opening Day 2025: White Sox have a winning Opening Day record, featuring some memorable moments
item.description: CHICAGO — Opening Day is finally upon us. It's a day that comes with a sense of hope among baseball fans in early spring, a season that represents new beginnings often exemplified by the warmer temperatures and the blooming of trees and flowers.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Runnin' Utes name Chris Wilcox general manager
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah head men's basketball coach Alex Jensen continues to fill his staff, announcing the addition of Sacramento Kings Assistant GM Wes Wilcox as the newest general manager for the Runnin' Utes program.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: This California MLB team has highest median ticket price, new report finds
item.description: A California team has the highest median ticket price, a new report found, but they don't play in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: BYU fans celebrate Sweet 16 bid with Cougars
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Hours after BYU pulled out a 91-89 thriller over Wisconsin to advance to its first Sweet 16 since 2011, hundred of diehard BYU fans showed up at Provo Airport at 1:30 in the morning to welcome the conquering heroes back from Denver. "What a game!" said one BYU fan.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mitchell returns to Utah, leads Cavs past Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Jarrett Allen scored 18 points and Donovan Mitchell added 16, helping Cleveland snap a four-game losing streak with a 120-91 victory over the Utah Jazz on Sunday. Evan Mobley had 11 points, 11 rebounds and three blocks to help the Cavaliers get back in the win column.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU headed to Sweet 16 after 91-89 win over Wisconsin
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time in 14 years, the BYU basketball team is headed to the Sweet 16. Richie Saunders scored 25 points, while Trevin Knell added 14, as the Cougars held off a ferocious late run by Wisconsin to hold on for a 91-89 victory at Ball Arena in Denver.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC wins scoring fest over Tampa Bay, 6-4
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Logan Cooley and Alex Kerfoot each scored twice and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Tampa Bay Lightning 6-4 at Delta Center on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: March Madness: No. 2 UConn routs Arkansas State 103-34 in opener as Fudd has 27 points
item.description: After the Red Wolves’ Crislyn Rose scored the game’s first basket in the NCAA Tournament first-round game, UConn ripped off the next 22 points en route to a convincing 103-34 victory on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: JIM FULLER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Purdue ends McNeese's March Madness run 76-62 to get back to Sweet 16
item.description: Trey Kaufman-Renn had 22 points and 15 rebounds, and Purdue used a fast start to roll to a 76-62 win over McNeese in the second round of the NCAA Tournament on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: No. 12 South Florida Falls To No. 5 Tennessee, 101-66, In The First Round Of NCAA Tournament
item.description: No. 12 seed South Florida (23-11) fell to No. 5 seed Tennessee (23-9), 101-66, in the first round of the NCAA Tournament at Value City Arena on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: USF Athletics, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dodgers-Cubs opener in Tokyo averages more than 25 million viewers in Japan, a record audience
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Tuesday's first game of the Tokyo Series averaged more than 25 million viewers in Japan according to Major League Baseball, making it the most-watched MLB game in the country's history.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks face Blues in St. Louis
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (20-40-9, in the Central Division) vs. St. Louis Blues (35-28-7, in the Central Division) St. Louis; Saturday, 3 p.m. EDT BOTTOM LINE: The St. Louis Blues host the Chicago Blackhawks with a four winning streak intact. St.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: How to watch Illinois' first-round NCAA March Madness matchup
item.description: Set for their fifth consecutive March Madness appearance, Illinois looks to build upon an up-and-down season as they open their 2025 NCAA Tournament run with one of the final first-round matchups.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9
